name: Tenmataitei
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>天</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>てん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>魔</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ま</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>大</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>たい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>帝</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>てい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Your opponent cannot activate cards or effects in response to the activation of any monster effect activated by a monster that was Normal Summoned/Set.
mnst_eff: Your opponent cannot activate cards or effects in response to the activation of any monster effect activated by a monster that was Normal Summoned/Set.
eff: Your opponent cannot activate cards or effects in response to the activation of any monster effect activated by a monster that was Normal Summoned/Set.

mst: Prevents activation of your opponent's Effect Monsters
Prevents activation of your opponent's Spell Cards
Prevents activation of your opponent's Trap Cards
